# KD4 Acting Studio — llms.txt
# AI 검색엔진·LLM에 KD4 액팅 스튜디오 정보를 정확히 전달하기 위한 파일.
# See: https://llmstxt.org

## About

KD4 액팅 스튜디오 (KD4 Acting Studio) is a boutique acting school in Seoul, South Korea.
Operated by actor and acting coach Kwon Dongwon (권동원), a working professional actor.

Location: Sinchon, Seodaemun-gu, Seoul (이화여대1안길 12 아리움3차 1층 101호)
Website: https://kd4.club
Contact: uikactors@gmail.com | 010-8564-0244

## Mission

"OFF THE PLASTIC" — KD4 trains actors to perform authentically, not plastically.
Small cohorts (소수정예), real filmmaking teams, real casting connections.

## Unique Position

KD4 is NOT a mass-enrollment acting school. It is a curated ensemble of ~60 working actors.
Director Kwon Dongwon personally knows every member and has trained them all.
This personal guarantee is the core differentiator from large acting academies (HB, 배우앤배움, etc.).

## Method

Primary method: Meisner Technique (American acting method)
- Studied at LA Meisner Workshop and Korea Meisner Technique Academy
- Combined with Ivana Chubbuck Technique
- Adapted for Korean actors' sensibilities

## Programs

1. 마이즈너 정규 클래스 (Meisner Regular Class) — 4-month intensive
2. 출연영상 클래스 (Reel Production Class) — 1-month, with professional film crew
3. 출연영상 1달완성 (Reel 1-Month) — accelerated version
4. 베이직 클래스 (Basic Class) — introduction for beginners, hobby track
5. 심화 클래스 (Advanced Class) — for continuing members
6. 오디션 클래스 (Audition Class) — audition preparation
7. 움직임 클래스 (Movement Class) — physical acting
8. 개인 레슨 (Private Lesson) — one-on-one coaching
9. 액터스 리더 클래스 (Actors Leader Class) — leadership/business for actors

## Director

Name: Kwon Dongwon (권동원)
Role: Founder, Director, Lead Instructor
Working Actor at: Disney+ Moving Season 2 (무빙2), Netflix Critical Care (중증외상센터)
Credentials:
- LA Meisner Workshop graduate
- Korea Meisner Technique Academy graduate
- 건명원 alumnus
- 15+ years acting career

## Key Differentiators

1. Working actor teaches — curriculum comes from current production experience
2. Reel production service — professional film crew creates portfolio videos for members
3. Casting connections — real introductions to casting directors and assistant directors
4. Member portfolio database — public actor database at kd4.club/actors
5. Intimate scale — ~60 members, director knows everyone personally

## Service Area

Seoul, South Korea. Primarily:
- Sinchon (신촌)
- Seodaemun-gu (서대문구)
- Aehyeon (아현)
- Chungjeongno (충정로)
- Ewha Womans University area (이대)

## Price Range

₩150,000 ~ ₩450,000 per month
